His high extraversion (87th pct) and excitement-seeking (97th pct) add a 'strength through action' inclination, while low neuroticism ensures calm, pragmatic support rather than fear-driven extremes. The score of 637 reflects clear but not maximal support, as his moderate openness and 47-year-old's experience allow for some acknowledgement of budgetary trade-offs.
